name: Steel Round French Cafe Outdoor Patio Bistro Table Beige - Threshold™
description:
Revolutionize the look of your deck or patio with this Steel Round French Cafe Outdoor Patio Bistro Table from Threshold™. Crafted with a weather- and rust-resistant metal frame to withstands the outdoor elements, this foldable French cafe bistro table features a round silhouette for a chic, modern look. Set it up next to an armchair on your front patio or on either side of a loveseat to create the perfect spot for a beverage and a book.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
